name: Guandao Puer Investment Co., Ltd S.A.
summary: Guandao Puer Investment Co., Ltd S.A., an investments holding company, trades in tea related goods. It also operates approximately 30 stores under the Guandao Shanshe name in China, as well as sells its products through online platform. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Kunming, China.
